A-share market-making — Strategy3 (interactive)

Fee/leg: Stock 20bps · Index ETF 10bps  |  short = prevClose×(1+spread), cover @ open · FX fixed 7.2 · trading-day axis
Spread→depth — Stock: 10/25/50/75bps = $2.5k / $5k / $20k / $50k  |  Index ETF: $7.5k / $15k / $60k / $150k
Window:  · cumulative PnL re-bases to 0 per window · click a spread in the legend to toggle

1  Portfolio — cumulative PnL (by spread)

2  Monthly PnL & worst drawdown (by universe & spread)

3  Overall — all 4 spreads combined

Total PnL if you run all four spread levels together (sum of 10+25+50+75 bps). Lines/bars are by universe.

4  Per-asset — pick a name from the dropdown

Overnight short: short at prevClose×(1+spread), cover at next open. Prices = Yahoo CNY ÷ fixed 7.2.
